title: epipactis angustifolia
intro: Epipactis angustifolia, also known as slender helleborine or narrow-leaved helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus and is native to Europe, Asia, and parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and even treating certain types of cancer. Epipactis angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
